name: freshchat
description: Reads Freshchat account, user, conversation, agent, group, channel, role, outbound, report, metrics, and business-hours data through the Freshchat v2 REST API; writes Freshchat users, conversations, agents, outbound messages, reports, and CSAT ratings.

risk.read: external Freshchat API reads of account metadata, users, conversations, messages, agents, groups, channels, roles, outbound messages, reports, metrics, and business-hours status
risk.write: creates, updates, or deletes Freshchat users, conversations, agents, outbound messages, reports, and CSAT ratings
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token
